query: What Dominion Energy commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Virginia?
final_answer:
Dominion Energy Virginia’s **GS-3 — Large General Service, Secondary Voltage** commercial class pays the **highest demand charge** among the active commercial tariff records I found.

| Dominion commercial class | Highest demand charge found |
|---|---:|
| **GS-3 — Large General Service Secondary Voltage** | **$24.959/kW** |
| GS-4 — Large General Service Primary Voltage | $23.592/kW |
| GS-2T — Time-of-Use | $16.192/kW |
| GS-2 Demand | $12.785/kW |

**Answer:** **GS-3 (Large General Service Secondary Voltage)**, with a maximum demand charge of **$14.569/kW base + $10.390/kW adjustment = $24.959/kW**.

**Source:** OpenEI Utility Rate Database / IURDB tariff records retrieved for **Virginia Electric & Power Co / Dominion Energy Virginia**, EIA utility ID **19876**, sector **Commercial**, active approved tariffs.
